title: Slay the Spire 2 gets a first trailer - coming to Early Access in 2025
contents:
Slay the Spire 2 is coming to Early Access in 2025 and we have the first official trailer to get you ready for more deck-building.

Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2024/12/slay-the-spire-2-gets-a-first-trailer-coming-to-early-access-in-2025
